title: Binary ops in `AtomicInt64` segfault when done on a `ThreadHandle`
author: devdanzin
body:
We get a segfault running the following code:

```python
import cereggii

cereggii.AtomicInt64(1).__rmatmul__(cereggii.ThreadHandle(1))
cereggii.AtomicInt64(1).__divmod__(cereggii.ThreadHandle(1))
# etc.
```

Backtrace:
```
Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
0x000055555594f78e in _Py_TYPE (ob=0x5) at ./Include/object.h:270
270             return ob->ob_type;

#0  0x000055555594f78e in _Py_TYPE (ob=0x5) at ./Include/object.h:270
#1  binary_op1 (v=v@entry=0x5, w=w@entry=0x7fffb2145600, op_slot=op_slot@entry=272, op_name=op_name@entry=0x5555561e76e0 "@")
    at Objects/abstract.c:937
#2  0x000055555594fc7d in binary_op (v=0x5, w=0x7fffb2145600, op_slot=op_slot@entry=272, op_name=op_name@entry=0x5555561e76e0 "@")
    at Objects/abstract.c:1003
#3  0x00005555559543f3 in PyNumber_MatrixMultiply (v=<optimized out>, w=<optimized out>) at Objects/abstract.c:1184
#4  0x000055555594fb12 in binary_op1 (v=v@entry=0x555556772790 <_PyRuntime+30288>, w=w@entry=0x7fffb2145600, op_slot=op_slot@entry=272,
    op_name=op_name@entry=0x5555561e76e0 "@") at Objects/abstract.c:972
#5  0x000055555594fc7d in binary_op (v=0x555556772790 <_PyRuntime+30288>, w=0x7fffb2145600, op_slot=op_slot@entry=272,
    op_name=op_name@entry=0x5555561e76e0 "@") at Objects/abstract.c:1003
#6  0x00005555559543f3 in PyNumber_MatrixMultiply (v=<optimized out>, w=<optimized out>) at Objects/abstract.c:1184
#7  0x0000555555b9045c in wrap_binaryfunc_r (self=0x7fffb29c4750, args=0x7fffb2a01bd0, wrapped=0x7ffff42d3c00 <AtomicInt64_MatrixMultiply>)
    at Objects/typeobject.c:9214
#8  0x00005555559df7ca in wrapperdescr_raw_call (kwds=0x0, args=0x7fffb2a01bd0, self=0x7fffb29c4750, descr=0x7fffb2a200f0)
    at Objects/descrobject.c:532
#9  wrapperdescr_call (_descr=_descr@entry=0x7fffb2a200f0, args=0x7fffb2a01bd0, args@entry=0x7fffb270d570, kwds=kwds@entry=0x0)
    at Objects/descrobject.c:570
#10 0x00005555559a99ef in _PyObject_MakeTpCall (tstate=tstate@entry=0x5555567c3a40 <_PyRuntime+362752>, callable=callable@entry=0x7fffb2a200f0,
    args=args@entry=0x7fffffffce08, nargs=2, keywords=keywords@entry=0x0) at Objects/call.c:242
#11 0x00005555559aa1c2 in _PyObject_VectorcallTstate (tstate=0x5555567c3a40 <_PyRuntime+362752>, callable=0x7fffb2a200f0, args=0x7fffffffce08,
    nargsf=<optimized out>, kwnames=0x0) at ./Include/internal/pycore_call.h:167
#12 0x00005555559aa1ee in PyObject_Vectorcall (callable=callable@entry=0x7fffb2a200f0, args=args@entry=0x7fffffffce08, nargsf=<optimized out>,
    kwnames=kwnames@entry=0x0) at Objects/call.c:327
```
